name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: A ‘free ticket’ into America?
body:
“We are truly in a crisis,” former President Obama’s Homeland Security Secretary Jeh Johnson said over the weekend. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9cf9294618&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 1, 2019
---
| | |
# **A ‘free ticket’ into America?**

**“We are truly in a crisis,”** former President Obama’s Homeland Security Secretary Jeh Johnson said over the weekend.

**The first thing** Johnson would look at each morning on the job, he explained, were the previous day’s border apprehension numbers. “I know that a thousand [apprehensions] overwhelms the system. I cannot begin to imagine what 4,000 a day looks like,” he said.
🎬[ Watch: Obama DHS Secretary agrees our border is in crisis](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d9e1acb9b&e=3ee4985eea)
**That staggering figure** is quickly becoming reality. Last month, U.S. immigration officers apprehended more than 75,000 individuals—the highest number in more than a decade. Now, the total is closing in on 100,000 migrants per month.

**Illegal immigration** is a problem Washington has ignored for decades. The crisis America faces today, however, is categorically different than any of its past versions.

**“Compared to past flows** , these migrants are arriving in enormous groups unlike any we’ve seen before,” Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen writes today. “In most years, only one or two ‘large groups’ of more than 100 migrants would arrive at our borders. Already in this fiscal year, we’ve seen more than 100 such large groups.”

**_The Wall Street Journal’s_** editorial board explains the problem clearly. Our “broken asylum system all but guarantees entry if you bring children,” they write. Smugglers know this loophole well, and it doesn't take a law enforcement expert to understand the dire humanitarian and security consequences that such a law invites.

**While Congressional Democrats** remain in denial, U.S. border officials “have identified 2,400 ‘false families’ over the last year as smugglers pair adults with unrelated children,” the _Journal_ reports.

**Secretary Nielsen** warns that America’s immigration system was not designed to handle this influx of vulnerable populations. Because of outdated laws and troubling court decisions, the majority of those who break our immigration laws will never be removed from the United States—no matter how hard our border agents work at their jobs.

**“The system is breaking,”** she says. “As a nation, we cannot stand for this.”

[Tackling the border emergency at its source](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=418eb3ae6c&e=3ee4985eea)

**More** : [President Donald J. Trump is standing strong](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c773537faa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump on ‘the power of redemption’**

**April is “Second Chance Month,”** and President Trump is using the occasion to celebrate a monumental achievement in reforming America’s criminal justice system.

**“Americans have always believed** in the power of redemption,” the President writes in his Proclamation. “Almost all of the more than two million people in America’s prisons will one day return to their communities. In each case, they will have served their sentence and earned the chance to take their places back in society.”

**The First Step Act** , which President Trump signed in December, is helping both inmates and former prisoners alike through rehabilitative programs, fair sentencing, and smarter confinement rules. The President’s 2020 Budget proposes more than $500 million in programs to help prisoners succeed in society after their release, as well.

[Watch: "It was time to fix this broken system," President Trump says.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e6b35573d4&e=3ee4985eea)

**By the numbers** : [President Trump’s bipartisan criminal justice win](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=400c521337&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Keegan Barber
| **On January 3, 2019, Matthew Charles became the first prisoner released as a result of President Trump’s First Step Act.**
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3aaddf6ec&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9900d97a4e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fd4fd07c40)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Thank you
body:
| | |
---
Peter, I can't thank you enough for your support this past quarter.

Since we launched this movement, I've gotten to meet some truly incredible people. I've been welcomed into bakeries and women-owned shops in Iowa. I visited a farmers' market on a beautiful day in South Carolina and was invited to speak at a church on Sunday morning. I met with young women leaders in Texas and California who I can't wait to vote for in the future. And to cap it all off, we took our fight to Trump's doorstep with a kickoff rally at Trump International in New York City.
**Your support directly translates to my ability to hear from people across the country.** It's an honor and a privilege, and I'm grateful to you for helping make it happen.

**Look what you 've helped build:**
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d03/2ae112ef/6cbadf6e/357dbbc2/1251313187/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5ODctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2987-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
_It 's women who are leading the fight for our democracy--and that was more clear than ever at the locally organized women's march in Des Moines._
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d03/2ae112ef/6cbadf6e/357dbbc2/1251313187/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5ODctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2987-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
_This campaign is shaped by your voices, your stories and your participation. I enjoyed some great conversations and connecting with moms in New Hampshire._
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d03/2ae112ef/6cbadf6e/357dbbc2/1251313187/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5ODctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2987-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
_Celebrating International Women 's Day with some future presidents in California._
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d03/2ae112ef/6cbadf6e/357dbbc2/1251313187/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5ODctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2987-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
_We need equal pay for equal work, affordable day care for all and national paid family leave. I talk about my plan to make that happen everywhere I go._
[](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d03/2ae112ef/6cbadf6e/357dbbc2/1251313187/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5ODctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2987-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
_Brave wins._
I'm so excited about the campaign we're running--one based on big, bold, brave ideas and solutions to our country's problems. One brave enough to stand up to the corruption and greed in Washington and to refuse money from corporate PACs, fossil fuel companies, federal lobbyists and a super PAC.
Our movement is people-powered, and I'm really glad you're in it with me.
Thank you, thank you, thank you for everything, and more soon!
Kirsten
| | To guarantee her spot on the Democratic debate stage, Kirsten needs support from 65,000 individual Americans. She has the most anti-Trump record in the Senate and will fight for progressive victories like the Green New Deal and Medicare for All. **[Can you donate right now to help make sure Kirsten's voice is heard on the debate stage?](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d03/2ae112ef/6cbadf6e/357dbbc2/1251313187/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2ctZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI5ODctb3QtZ2ZwLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kg-email?refcode=jtk2987-ot-gfp-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d03/2ae112ef/6cbadf6e/357dbbcd/1251313187/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: $12 million. And not a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists.
body:
I want to start by saying thank you for everything you’ve done to power
our campaign for president. Because you’re one of our most dedicated
supporters, I wanted you to be the first to know:

During the first quarter of our campaign, we raised $12 million from
218,000 donations. That’s huge.

The response to our campaign has been incredible. Together, we set out to
build a campaign of, by, and for the people -- and that’s exactly what
we’re doing. Not a dime from PACs. No donations from federal lobbyists.
Just people, pitching in $5, $10 at a time to power our movement.

Together, we’re fighting to make the largest investment in teachers in
American history, to provide the average teacher a $13,500 raise.

Together, we’re working to ease the burden of skyrocketing rent costs on
working families across the country.

Together, we’re fighting to ensure that health care is a fundamental right
-- and deliver that right with Medicare for All.

We have put the power of our campaign in the hands of the people -- and
none of this could be possible without you. I am grateful you are with us
in this fight.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

Kamala Harris is running a grassroots campaign for president. Our campaign
won’t take a dime from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists -- we’re
putting our success in the hands of the people.

If you can, pitch in a donation
tonight:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190401-12million?refcode=ema190401-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=4210_5755789_u_W0MK&akid=4210%2E5755789%2Eu_W0MK ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190401-12million?refcode=ema190401-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=4210_5755789_u_W0MK&akid=4210%2E5755789%2Eu_W0MK ]Chip in $100 now

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Democrats Need to Help Fix the Border Crisis or Get Out of Trump’s Way
body:
“Even the most partisan Democrats are hard-pressed at this point to deny that the border crisis President Trump has long been warning about...” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1044052050&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Democrats Need to Help Fix the Border Crisis or Get Out of Trump’s Way**

“Even the most partisan Democrats are hard-pressed at this point to deny that the border crisis President Trump has long been warning about actually exists,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “Yet that hasn’t stopped them from reflexively denouncing pretty much any action he takes — without suggesting any solution or ideas of their own.”

More than 76,000 individuals crossed the border illegally in February. The total for March is likely to exceed 100,000.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac0f2a92f0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump designated April as First Step Act Month, which includes cutting prison sentences for thousands of federal inmates, at a ceremony Monday,” Frank Miles reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f39e7ed0ec&e=3ee4985eea). “We’re a nation that believes in redemption,” the President said yesterday. With the passage of the bipartisan criminal justice reform bill in December, President Trump “scored a win that eluded his predecessor, Barack Obama.”
---
|
---
| “With one voice, the Democrats led by Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi have for months called the mass migration of peoples from Latin America northward nothing more than a ‘manufactured crisis.’ Joined by a few foolish Republicans, they have done their best to thwart President Trump’s efforts to enforce border security,” _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8d95c1fa42&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “The president must follow through, if need be, to close the border.”
---
|
---
| “Earlier this year the national media reported, almost with an implied glee, that taxpayers weren’t seeing the benefits they thought they would reap when President Donald Trump enacted the GOP-backed tax reform package in December 2017 . . . But as we see so often in Trump era, mining the truth requires digging a little deeper,” the _[Florida Times-Union](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=12c8506cdb&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “To recap, looking across the economy we see more Americans working than ever, a robust rise in earnings relative to the recent past, and more money in paychecks with the anticipation of little drop off in the average tax refund.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e2f99f93f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8df6f4b0f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f90a2fce56)
---
|
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

The total for March is likely to exceed 100,000. | | “President Trump designated April as First Step Act Month, which includes cutting prison sentences for thousands of federal inmates, at a ceremony Monday,” Frank Miles reports for . “We’re a nation that believes in redemption,” the President said yesterday. With the passage of the bipartisan criminal justice reform bill in December, President Trump “scored a win that eluded his predecessor, Barack Obama.” | | “With one voice, the Democrats led by Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi have for months called the mass migration of peoples from Latin America northward nothing more than a ‘manufactured crisis.’ Joined by a few foolish Republicans, they have done their best to thwart President Trump’s efforts to enforce border security,” editorial board writes. “The president must follow through, if need be, to close the border.” | | “Earlier this year the national media reported, almost with an implied glee, that taxpayers weren’t seeing the benefits they thought they would reap when President Donald Trump enacted the GOP-backed tax reform package in December 2017 . . . But as we see so often in Trump era, mining the truth requires digging a little deeper,” the editorial board writes. “To recap, looking across the economy we see more Americans working than ever, a robust rise in earnings relative to the recent past, and more money in paychecks with the anticipation of little drop off in the average tax refund.” | | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: This isn't just a "women's issue"
body:
America can never achieve her full potential until women can achieve theirs.
| | |
---
| | _Today is Equal Pay Day --and I'm marking it by promising that as president, I will prioritize closing the wage gap once and for all. I'll be a president who will fight for equal pay, but I need you to stand with me:_ **[Demand equal pay for equal work!](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "http://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg-equalpayday?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk3002-su-gfp-nd")**
---
Peter, for every strong woman, there is a man who probably gets paid more for doing the same job.
This problem should have been solved decades ago with the Equal Pay Act. But because of loopholes in that law, women on average still only make 80 cents for every $1 a white man makes. And for women of color, the numbers are much worse. That has to end now. We tell little girls, "You can be anything you set your mind to." And while they can be anything they want to be, the reality is they can't expect to be paid fairly for their work. It's a moral outrage--and a drain on the economy--that holds everyone back.
I've co-sponsored legislation to close the wage gap in every _single_ Congress I've been part of. **And I promise you now, if I'm elected president, I will make equal pay a top priority. But I need you with me, building a movement of people who don't just say they support gender equality but take brave, bold actions to make that vision a reality. Will you stand with me and fight for an economy that values women?**
**[We need 20,000 people--100,000x the difference between white men's and the average women's pay--to add their name right now to demand equal pay. With your help, we'll power this campaign all the way to the White House, where we'll finally close the wage gap.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "http://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg-equalpayday?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk3002-su-gfp-nd")**
America cannot achieve her full potential until women achieve theirs, and we know unequal pay is holding our economy back. It's a key factor in family and multigenerational poverty. And each year is littered with even more Equal Pay Days as we reach the points when Asian American women, white women, black women, Native American women and Latina women each catch up to white men's pay from the year before.
**This ends now. It's time for this country to show we value women through our actions, not just our words. But I can't take this fight to the White House without your support.**
**[Add your name right now to help elect a president who will fight for equal pay for all--no matter what. ](https://secure.kirstengillibrand. "http://act.kirstengillibrand.com/kg-equalpayday?firstName=Peter&lastName=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk3002-su-gfp-nd")**
Thank you for taking a brave stand,

Kirsten
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.kirstengillibrand.com/page/m/4f976d2c/2ae112ef/6ccd84c0/357db41e/1085563928/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://gillibrand.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | Paid for by Gillibrand 2020
---
Contributions or gifts to Gillibrand 2020 are not tax-deductible. Gillibrand 2020 does not accept contributions from federal lobbyists, corporate and/or trade association PACs, or "for profit" business entities, including but not limited to sole proprietorships, partnerships, and LLCs.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: [Petition] I’m asking you to sign this petition to put pressure on Mitch McConnell to do the right thing:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
| | | Please read the following petition signature request from Abigail Spanberger, and then [**add your name to demand that Senator Mitch McConnell bring important gun violence prevention legislation up for a vote in the Senate. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aEW4THLLW9aMcATaKHmtw3Ekhu-gPUDl4ewX4H_65NQ=/haKpnHKZDOUPfsDD9IduuciBeLE1AM68EpsWAi7FSCw=)
| [SIGN MY NAME »](https://act.myngp.com/el/aEW4THLLW9aMcATaKHmtw3Ekhu-gPUDl4ewX4H_65NQ=/haKpnHKZDOUPfsDD9IduuciBeLE1AM68EpsWAi7FSCw=)
---

Peter --

Last month, the House took decisive action to pass a much needed gun violence prevention law in our country. So, I cast my vote in support of that bill, H.R. 8, which would enact more thorough background checks on every firearm purchase and closes gun purchasing loopholes.

The wide majority of Americans believe that we need to enact proper, commonsense background checks. This bill addresses the gun violence epidemic that has impacted so many communities across the country. **But unfortunately, this legislation to enact full background checks is currently being stalled by partisan political tactics in the Senate.**

Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell is so far refusing to even bring the H.R. 8 legislation to the Senate for a simple up-or-down vote. Not only is that unfair -- it is deliberately sabotaging our democratic process to score political points.

Peter, I'm a mother of three beautiful, young girls. I understand the seriousness of this issue that has particularly affected our nation's youth in an unprecedented number of school shootings. We have an obligation to act as a nation, and to work to prevent tragedies that stem from gun violence. Too many communities across our country, and right here in Virginia, have been affected to allow the first major legislative action in decades to fail.

[**Families across the country who have been impacted by gun violence deserve better. Will you add your name to this petition to demand that Mitch McConnell give H.R. 8 a vote in the Senate? >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aEW4THLLW9aMcATaKHmtw3Ekhu-gPUDl4ewX4H_65NQ=/haKpnHKZDOUPfsDD9IduuciBeLE1AM68EpsWAi7FSCw=)
[SIGN MY NAME »](https://act.myngp.com/el/aEW4THLLW9aMcATaKHmtw3Ekhu-gPUDl4ewX4H_65NQ=/haKpnHKZDOUPfsDD9IduuciBeLE1AM68EpsWAi7FSCw=)
---
We need to put pressure on Mitch McConnell and the Senate to take action on this bill. Your signature on this petition will help us show that the American public won't sit by while real commonsense gun violence legislation sits in waiting for a vote.

Thank you for taking action,

_Abigail_
| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/aEW4THLLW9aMcATaKHmtw3Ekhu-gPUDl4ewX4H_65NQ=/oHLjeOJT5RjhKhaBPpd71odRTAghj3B0-dZIas8sQgU=)

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/aEW4THLLW9aMcATaKHmtw3Ekhu-gPUDl4ewX4H_65NQ=/V1hgOO3Qpm92ErTP1ymR_fOQt_3uZDpxBAkaNOwuU4o=) to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/aEW4THLLW9aMcATaKHmtw3Ekhu-gPUDl4ewX4H_65NQ=/ySSf7TmJ3Y2onIz7cjgoucVoXbuNeu5eOO3UKuXg5J0=).

Spanberger For Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen, VA 23058

| Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Obama Border Patrol chief perfectly explains our immigration crisis
body:
While President Trump has taken action to address our national emergency at the border, Democrats still refuse to acknowledge a problem even exists. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9e526d5a98&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 2, 2019
---
| | |
# **Obama Border Patrol chief perfectly explains our immigration crisis**

**Homeland Security Secretary Kirstjen Nielsen** announced yesterday that more than 750 U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers will be temporarily reassigned to America’s southwest border. “The situation at our southern border has gone from a crisis to near system-wide meltdown,” the Secretary wrote yesterday.

**While President Donald J. Trump** has taken action to address our national emergency at the border, Congressional Democrats still refuse to acknowledge a problem even exists—much less present any serious plan to address it.

**They should listen** to Mark Morgan, head of the U.S. Border Patrol under former President Obama.
🎬[ Watch: Obama Border Patrol Chief on America’s asylum crisis](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b82bed4af1&e=3ee4985eea)
**The problem starts** with glaring loopholes in America’s immigration laws, particularly those governing the asylum process. The intelligence shows that most asylum-seekers “are coming here for two reasons,” Morgan says. “Economic equality and family reunification. They are not fleeing persecution or violence, and the stats show that.”

**But it gets worse.** “The incentives to come here are overwhelming,” he says. “They’re willing to take this dangerous trek because they know: Grab a kid, set one foot on American soil, and you’re allowed . . . to remain here unchecked.”

**No modern immigration system** should function that way. “The crisis at our border is worsening, and DHS will do everything in its power to end it,” Secretary Nielsen says. “We will not stand idly by while Congress fails to act yet again, so all options are on the table.”

[Immigration official: We are facing an unprecedented crisis.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3600c884ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **A message on World Autism Awareness Day**

**“On World Autism Awareness Day,** we honor the millions of Americans living with autism spectrum disorder (ASD), who, in spite of the challenges they may face, continue to make extraordinary contributions to their families, their communities, our Nation, and the world,” President Trump writes in his Proclamation this week. “We also express our sincere appreciation to the families, friends, medical professionals, and caregivers who help Americans with ASD pursue the American Dream.”

**As a country,** it’s crucial that we continue to support all Americans with ASD. The Trump Administration has secured funding for cutting-edge research while enhancing all available resources and treatments to help both those affected by ASD and their families, communities, and caregivers.

**“Today, we celebrate** the tremendous accomplishments of Americans with ASD and reaffirm our commitment to work together to ensure that every member of our society is afforded equal opportunities to reach their full potential.”

[Read President Trump’s Proclamation for Autism Awareness Day](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9a57e12989&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: First Lady takes ‘Be Best’ to Florida**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6997834a16&e=3ee4985eea)
---
First Lady Melania Trump visits with students at West Gate Elementary School.
| **Last week,** First Lady Melania Trump took time to visit with students at West Gate Elementary School in Palm Beach, Florida. Dovetailing with the First Lady’s Be Best initiative, the school offers a unique program specifically designed to eliminate bullying in the classroom.

**The First Lady** has placed a heavy emphasis on the well-being of children, and she continually highlights programs that live up to this calling. West Gate Elementary School commits itself to removing bullying from the learning environment by setting aside time for biweekly meetings between teachers and students. The goal of their program is to develop strong emotional intelligence through peer-to-peer interactions.

**“I believe** it is important for schools to focus on the overall well-being of our youngest citizens, which will help them develop in their earliest years so that they can reach their full potential as our next generation,” the First Lady said.

[More on the First Lady’s visit to West Gate Elementary School](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1fb5e31d39&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98b48ad58f&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf482ea266&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=04acaa9b91)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
